title: OYSROMA Extends Condolences to Flood Victims
description: The Oyo State Road Maintenance Agency, OYSROMA, has expressed its deepest condolences to the families, friends, and loved ones of those affected by the recent flooding in Ilu-Aje and Imini in Afijio l
html:
The Oyo State Road Maintenance Agency, OYSROMA, has expressed its deepest condolences to the families, friends, and loved ones of those affected by the recent flooding in Ilu-Aje and Imini in Afijio local government area of the State.

A statement by the Chairman, OYSROMA, Hon. ‘Busoye Ogunlade on Saturday acknowledged the devastating impact of this natural disaster on communities, homes, and livelihoods.

He wrote, “My heart goes out to everyone affected by the devastating floods. May the love and support of family and friends bring comfort during this difficult time.”

Ogunlade assured residents of the areas of the Agency’s commitment to speedily work on ways to provide necessary assistance to forestall further occurrence.

“May the affected individuals and families find strength during this challenging time,” he said.
